items.title: Improve App Connectivity
items.rationale: 86% of negative reviews mention app connectivity issues, which is the most frequently mentioned topic.

items.title: Enhance Battery Life
items.rationale: 7 out of 9 reviews mentioning battery have a negative sentiment, indicating a significant concern.

items.title: Streamline Setup Process
items.rationale: 84 out of 90 reviews mentioning setup have a negative sentiment, suggesting a frustrating user experience.

items.title: Improve Customer Service
items.rationale: 36 out of 39 reviews mentioning customer service have a negative sentiment, indicating a need for improvement.

items.title: Optimize Price Point
items.rationale: 17 out of 20 reviews mentioning price have a negative sentiment, suggesting a price sensitivity issue.
